title: Dekton 280ML Multipurpose Silicon Sealant White - Good-Quality, Multi-Purpose Acrylic for Indoor Applications, UV Resistant, Flexible, Easy Application, Excellent Adhesion to Wet Surfaces & Paintable
features: Versatile Indoor Use: Designed for a wide range of applications including tiles, glass, ceramics, aluminum, and plastic frames. Perfect for sealing baths, sinks, walk-in showers, and kitchen sinks, making it ideal for kitchens and bathrooms.

One Component Formula: This high-quality acrylic sealant is easy to apply, requiring no mixing. It forms a permanent water-repellent layer upon curing, providing long-lasting protection against moisture.

Flexible and Durable: After curing, the sealant remains flexible, allowing for movement without cracking or losing adhesion. This durability ensures a reliable seal that withstands daily wear and tear.

Paintable and UV Resistant: Once cured, the surface can be painted over, allowing for seamless integration into your decor. The UV-resistant formula ensures that the sealant maintains its appearance and effectiveness even in sunny conditions.

Non-Corrosive and Strong Adhesion: Excellent adhesion to moist and absorbent surfaces means it can be applied in damp environments without compromising performance. It's also non-corrosive to metals, making it safe for use around various materials.
description: The Dekton 280ML Multipurpose Silicon Sealant White Sealant is a high-quality, one-component multi-purpose acrylic sealant specifically formulated for a wide range of indoor applications. Whether you're sealing tiles, glass, ceramics, aluminum, or plastic frames, this sealant performs exceptionally well. It's perfect for baths, sinks, walk-in showers, kitchen sinks, and door and window frames. Easy to apply, it forms a permanently water-repellent layer upon curing, providing lasting protection against moisture. The sealant remains flexible for a long time, ensuring it can accommodate movement without cracking or losing adhesion. Once cured, it's paintable and UV-resistant, allowing you to integrate it seamlessly into your decor. The excellent adhesion to moist and absorbent surfaces means you can confidently use it in damp environments. Plus, it’s non-corrosive to metals, making it safe for various materials. Trust Dekton for reliable, flexible, and durable sealing solutions in your kitchen and bathroom projects.
